name: todo-excel-backend
description: Beginner-friendly Node.js app for managing todo tasks in an Excel file.

scripts.seed:excel: node -e "const { writeTasks } = require('./utils/excelHelper'); writeTasks([{ id: 1, title: 'Learn Node.js', completed: false, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() }, { id: 2, title: 'Build a todo API', completed: false, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() }]); console.log('Seeded tasks.xlsx');"
